◎简　　介  

　　The farmers of a village decide to postpone the construction of a new school in profit of a concentration to cheese production. From a novel by Jeremias Gotthelf. The story of this new, modern cheese dairy, which causes confusion and consternation in a farming village, is also intended to teach about how politics were conducted in those days and how the grand words and little e...
